name: BB:FalsePositive: Device and Specific Event
notes: Edit this BB to include the devices and QID of devices that continually generate false positives.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Device and Specific Event on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: the event QID is one of the following (1010461) Behavioral - Event CRE
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Classify5
